Patrick Kennelly @PatrickKennelly · 4min Her: “God, he must really not like this place”
Him: “If Albert Einstein was supposed to be his best 3yo, could this be his worst classic crop in years?” 3 22

item.title: Race_iQ: RaceiQ @Race_iQ · 18min Eight runners in the Greenham and six different fastest furlong "winners". Overall Time Index 5.
item.description:
RaceiQ @Race_iQ · 18min Eight runners in the Greenham and six different fastest furlong "winners". Overall Time Index 5.7, when the Meeting Average was 5.6.
F1: Alparsian 14.84sec F2: Gonna Fly 11.52 F3: Aqpan 11.43 F4: Albert Einstein 11.72 F5: Aqpan 11.37 F6: Zavateri 11.43 F7: Needle Match Mostrar más Cita ITV Racing @itvracing · 8h What a winner for Clifford Lee!
Alparlsan wins Watership Down Stud Too Darn Hot Greenham Stakes
#ITVRacing | @CliffordleexLee | @karl_burke Este video no está disponible en tu ubicación. 404
